dealSummary: Modal, which rents out software and GPUs to train AI models, is in talks to raise a new round led by Accel and Redpoint Ventures at a valuation of around $4.5 billion, The Information reported.
London-based AI chips developer Fractile secured $220 million in a round led by Accel, Factorial Funds and Founders Fund.

Create Medicines, a biotech startup developing treatments for cancer and autoimmune diseases, raised a $122 million Series B led by Newpath Partners, ARCH Venture Partners and Hatteras Venture Partners.
leadInvestors: Newpath Partners, ARCH Venture Partners, Hatteras Venture Partners

dealSummary: AI power infrastructure company Gridcare secured a $64 million Series A led by Sutter Hill Ventures.
French natural hydrogen exploration startup Mantle8 raised a €31 million Series A led by Sandwater.

company: Equipifi, developer of a bank-integrated buy now, pay later platform
dealSummary: Equipifi, developer of a bank-integrated buy now, pay later platform, received a $34 million Series B led by Left Lane Capital.
Nectar Social, the developer of an agentic marketing operating system, raised a $30 million Series A led by Menlo Ventures.
Saudi Arabia-based fintech Stitch secured a $25 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz.
GovWell, a developer of AI software for government institutions, raised a $25 million Series A led by Insight Partners.
Wirestock, a startup providing datasets to AI labs for model development, secured a $23 million Series A led by Nava Ventures.
